prompt: I want to verify that the health check cron is working correctly now. The latest successful session transcript is at /tmp/health-success-session.jsonl. Analyze it and tell me if there are any execution issues, and separately report the business-level findings.

assertions.text: Reports NO execution failure patterns (no false positives for E1/E2/E3/E4)
Notes proper poll timeouts (180000ms, 60000ms) as correct behavior
Uses parse_session.py script from skill bundle (not ad-hoc parsing)
Identifies business findings: UNHEALTHY verdict, duplicate schedules from captured output
Correctly separates execution health (good) from business health (issues found)
